[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010011 4
1 1010010 3
2 1000001 2
3 0100100 2
4 0010000 1
5 1100110 4
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

01 10 1111110 6
12 21 1111111 a match 6 7
23 32 1110111 6
34 43 1100111 5
45 54 1111111 a match 6 7
56 65 1111111 a match 6 7
67 76 1111111 a match 6 7
70 07 0111011 5

13 31 1111110 6
24 42 1110111 6
35 53 1011011 5
46 64 1101111 6

60 06 1101111 6
71 17 1111111 a match 6 7

03 30 1100010 3
14 41 1111111 a match 6 7
25 52 1111111 a match 6 7
36 63 1101111 6
47 74 0111111 6
50 05 1111011 6
61 16 1111111 a match 6 7
72 27 1111111 a match 6 7

04 40 0100111 4
15 51 1111111 a match 6 7
26 62 1111111 a match 6 7
37 73 1011011 5
